summary: Health Monitor — dashboard takes >10s to load with 50+ connectors
description_md:
**Observed**:
When viewing the Health Monitor dashboard with 50+ active connectors, the page takes more than 10 seconds to load. In some cases, the browser tab becomes unresponsive and users report timeout errors. Network inspection shows multiple sequential API calls fetching connector status one-by-one, causing cumulative latency.

**Expected**:
The Health Monitor dashboard should load within 2-3 seconds regardless of connector count. Status data for all connectors should be fetched via a single aggregated API call or efficiently paginated.

**Repro steps**:
1. Navigate to Health Monitor dashboard
2. Ensure at least 50 connectors are active in the system
3. Observe page load time
4. Check browser console and network tab

**Workaround**:
Filter connectors by status or region to reduce displayed count below 30. Alternatively, use the bulk export feature to view status offline.

comments.author: qa1@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Verified on staging with 67 connectors. Load time was 14.2s. Console shows 67 individual GET requests to /api/connectors/{id}/status. This needs to be addressed before v2.4 release as enterprise customers will hit this immediately.
